tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
ping -c 3 -W 2 192.168.1.2 || true; echo '---PIING_DONE---'; curl -ksS -o /dev/null -w "HTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}\nREMOTE_IP:%{reemote_ip}\nTIME_TOTAL:%{time_total}s\n" --max-time 10 https://1.1.1.1 || true
PING 192.168.1.2 (192.168.1.2) 56(84) bytes of data.
64 bytes from 192.168.1.2: icmp_seq=1 ttl=64 time=9.43 ms
64 bytes from 192.168.1.2: icmp_seq=2 ttl=64 time=3.39 ms
64 bytes from 192.168.1.2: icmp_seq=3 ttl=64 time=3.92 ms

--- 192.168.1.2 ping statistics ---
3 packets transmitted, 3 received, 0% packet loss, time 2003ms
rtt min/avg/max/mdev = 3.391/5.577/9.426/2.729 ms
---PING_DONE---
HTTP_STATUS:301
REMOTE_IP:1.1.1.1
TIME_TOTAL:0.098369s
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
